title: How a borough in Merseyside is bucking the UK's youth unemployment trend
description: Could personalised early intervention help prevent under-16s falling into the Neet trap?
content:

title: Ruben Dias says he 'draws line' over Maya Jama break-up speculation
description: The Man City footballer says he usually remains silent on rumours about his personal life, but feels forced to correct the public record.
content:
Manchester City footballer Ruben Dias has confirmed his break-up with Love Island presenter Maya Jama, but insisted he did not cheat on her during their relationship.

title: Abolishing patient watchdog leaves NHS 'marking own homework', councils warn
description: The plans are part of a government bill to modernise the NHS in England, which is currently going through parliament.
content:
Abolishing the organisation which champions patient views on health and social care would leave the NHS "marking their own homework", a group representing local councils in England and Wales has warned.

title: Pair jailed over 139mph Manchester crash that killed pedestrian
description: Uways Hussain and Usmon Mahmood inhaled nitrous oxide before the collision in which 50-year-old Sylvester Abayomi died
content:
A driver and passenger who inhaled nitrous oxide while travelling at speeds of up to 139mph in a 30mph zone before a fatal collision have been jailed.

title: Joao Fonseca: Why French Open win over Novak Djokovic marks arrival of 19-year-old
description: Why Joao Fonseca's five-set French Open victory over the legendary Novak Djokovic shows the 19-year-old has arrived at the top of tennis.
content:
"He's got the goods."
The words of Novak Djokovic at the 2025 Australian Open after an 18-year-old Joao Fonseca had stunned ninth seed Andrey Rublev on his Grand Slam debut.
